started.

About
You.

Personal details only. Kept strictly confidential — used for project communication and legal records.

Your
Business.

The brand or company. This becomes the legal and operational foundation for your project.

Required

About the Business
Please describe your business
Phase 03 / 06

Creative
Direction.

This is where your project finds its voice. Help us understand the feeling you want to create.

When someone scrolls through your website, what do you want them to feel? What should their gut reaction be? What emotion, word, or sensation captures the experience you want to create?

Please describe the feeling
Please describe your target audience

List the pages you want on your website. If you leave this blank, we will decide what makes sense based on your brief and brand.

Phase 04 / 06

Visual
DNA.

Your palette, your type, your feel. Hex codes, color names, or plain descriptions — whatever helps.

Phase 05 / 06

Logistics &
Assets.

The practical details. Leave blank wherever you don’t have something yet — we’ll follow up.

Date must be at least 48 hours from now

Timelines under 7 days may incur a rush fee.

Right to Decline. Submitting this brief does not guarantee a project start. Velocity reserves the right to decline any project that is not a fit for our studio.

24-Hour Rule. All information in this brief becomes read-only exactly 24 hours after submission. Make sure everything is accurate before you submit.

Terms & Conditions. By submitting this brief you agree that: (1) This submission does not constitute a contract or guarantee of services. (2) All information provided is accurate to the best of your knowledge. (3) Velocity retains the right to decline any project at its sole discretion. (4) Your brief data will be stored securely and used solely for the purpose of evaluating and executing your project. (5) You will not hold Velocity liable for any delay or decline of service. (6) Upon payment, the project scope is defined by this brief and any written amendments agreed to by both parties. (7) All original design work created by Velocity remains the property of Velocity until full payment is received.

You must agree to the terms to continue
Phase 06 / 06

Final
Details.

Almost done. A few last things before we get to work.

A domain is your website’s address on the internet — like yourbrand.com. You purchase it once and pay a small renewal fee each year (~$15–$20). If you already have one, great. If not, we can register one for you.

How would you like to handle your domain?

Would you like us to feature your website in our portfolio and as a case study? This helps other businesses discover our work.

May we display your website as a live preview in our portfolio? This helps potential clients see our work in action. You can change this later.
